user.title: Salaah Times — add a sheet
user.description: Paste the published Google Sheet CSV URL.

data.date_format: Date format used in the sheet

date_column.title: Date column
date_column.description: Which column in your sheet contains the date?

map_prayers.title: Map prayer columns
map_prayers.description: Match each prayer to its column. Set to '__none__' if not in your sheet.

select_prayers.title: Enable prayers
select_prayers.description: Choose which prayers to create sensors for in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_url: Could not parse a valid Google Sheet URL. Make sure it is published as CSV.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the sheet. Check the URL and your internet connection.
error.empty_sheet: The sheet appears empty or has no column headers.

init.title: Enable / disable prayers
init.description: Toggle which prayers are active as sensors.

rename.title: Custom prayer names
rename.description: Set a custom display name for each sensor. Leave unchanged to keep the default.

prefix.title: Sensor name prefix
prefix.description: Optional prefix for all sensor names from this sheet. E.g. 'Green Lane' gives 'Green Lane Fajr Jama'ah'. Leave blank to use the sheet label.
